Occupied Territory Layer
Geometry source: uploaded GeoJSON dataset representing Russian-occupied territory of Ukraine. Coordinate precision: 5 decimal places (~1 m). Properties stripped; geometry only retained.
All peer-reviewed sources cited in Petakh et al. (2024) and the companion literature review:
Pathogens in the Trenches: The Resurgence of Vector-Borne and Zoonotic Threats during the Ukraine–Russia Conflict, 2022–2026
